displayNameZh: 负空间圆形 Logo 揭幕
summary: Logo Negative Reveal component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的负空间圆形 Logo 揭幕组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/logo-negative-reveal/src/LogoNegativeReveal.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `LogoNegativeReveal` and `logoNegativeRevealDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Logo Negative Reveal Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/logo-negative-reveal to my project. Preserve the exported LogoNegativeRevealProps API and register the LogoNegativeReveal composition with the default props.
